---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the writing pipeline or developer experience
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What limitation or friction are you running into?

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain the expected benefit for writing quality, reliability, cost, or usability.

## Suggested Scope

- Stage affected:
- Roles affected:
- State / memory impact:
- Backward compatibility concerns:

## Additional Context

Links, examples, or related ideas.
